formulas.name: Poetic Imagery
formulas.formula: Imagery creates vivid sensory experiences in the reader
formulas.notes: Used to evoke emotions and establish atmosphere

formulas.name: Symbolism
formulas.formula: Symbols represent abstract ideas or concepts
formulas.variables: Object, concept, or idea being symbolized
formulas.notes: Used to convey deeper meaning or significance

formulas.name: Metaphor
formulas.formula: A comparison between two unlike things without 'like' or 'as'
formulas.notes: Used to create a vivid and memorable impression

formulas.name: Alliteration
formulas.formula: Repetition of initial consonant sounds in words
formulas.variables: Words with repeated initial consonant sounds
formulas.notes: Used to create a musical or rhythmic effect

formulas.name: Personification
formulas.formula: Attributing human qualities or actions to non-human entities
formulas.variables: Non-human entity, human quality or action
formulas.notes: Used to create a sense of connection or relationship

formulas.name: Irony
formulas.formula: A discrepancy or incongruity between what is expected and what occurs
formulas.notes: Used to highlight the absurdity or contradiction
